subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Several letters were dispatched, yet no reply to any of them hath been received [3.5s]... ...and this servant has, as a thing divinely ordained, been unwell for some time past, until I went to Beirut for a change of air
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب روحانی چند مکتوب است که ارسال میشود و جواب هیچیک نرسیده است
